archimate:Outcome.name: Operational Model that is market-oriented
archimate:Outcome.documentation: The Operational Model established by LDT CitiVERSE EDIC is market-oriented and regularly adjusted through engagement with stakeholders, ensuring long-term relevance and alignment with industry standards, while the strategic development plan positions the EDIC as a central enabler of multicountry projects, collaborating with leaders across industries to secure sustainable growth.
